name: Almond Deviled Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice eggs in half lengthwise and remove yolks, setting whites aside.
2. In a small bowl, mash the egg yolks, mayonnaise, mustard, garlic salt, and chopped almonds together.
3. Fill the egg whites evenly with the mixture.
4. Garnish with whole almonds and parsley.
5. Chill until ready to serve.
Yield: 12 servings.
